nasb.text: I was at ease, but He shattered me, And He has grasped me by the neck and shaken me to pieces; He has also set me up as His target.

esv.text: I was at ease, and he broke me apart; he seized me by the neck and dashed me to pieces; he set me up as his target;

cnv.text: 我本來安逸，他卻把我壓碎； 掐著我的頸項，把我摔碎； 又把我當作他的箭靶。

ccb.text: 我本来平顺，祂击垮了我， 祂抓住我的颈项将我摔碎， 把我当祂的箭靶。
